boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the cloud operator execute the infrastructure or privileged-admin action now? Focus: staging approval applied to prod.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Boundary not closed by current source records.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Exact dependency remains open before privileged execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Current production approval and ticket match unresolved.

critical_features_preserved: current production environment approval and ticket match
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record says the required dependency is missing or mismatched, and policy requires the exact boundary to be closed by current source records before execution. The safest source-bound reading is ESCALATE until production approval and ticket match are explicitly resolved.
open_blockers: current production environment approval and ticket match
